title: DECISION: process-wide mutex for swtpm env-var serialization is correct
description: SWTPM_INIT_LOCK serializes concurrent open_swtpm/connect calls to prevent two threads corrupting each other's SWTPM_SERVER_NAME/PORT env vars. A contributor might suggest removing it as 'env vars are rarely set concurrently'. Do not. This is the only safe path given that setenv is a global mutation with no per-thread scope. The comment explicitly documents the remaining gap (unrelated threads touching the same vars) so users are not surprised.
